title: vatica albiramis
intro: Vatica albiramis, also known as the Sabah white lauan, is a species of tree in the family Dipterocarpaceae, native to the island of Borneo. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Vatica albiramis include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. Traditional herbal preparations of Vatica albiramis include tea infusions, extracts, and tinctures, which are often used to promote overall wellness and prevent illness.
